name: Mr. Bricolage SA
summary: Mr. Bricolage SA engages in the renovation and embellishment of houses and gardens. It serves its customers under the Mr. Bricolage and Les Briconautes brands. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated 854 stores, which included 783 in France and 71 internationally. It also sells its services online. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in La Chapelle Saint Mesmin, France.
